name: Landonia
short_description: Developed by a solo novice developer, Landonia is an old-school single-player, cRPG that includes parties upto 16 player characters, exploration, factions, grinding, and class-based progression.  There are different modes of play including ARPG style, and classic turn-based style.
detailed_description:
A tribute to the old-school cRPG grind, BBS MUDs of the 1990s and early MMORPGs.  Developed by a solo novice developer, Landonia is an old-school single-player, turn-based RPG that includes possibilities of parties upto 16 player-characters, treasures, grinding, questing, and classic cRPG play.   There are numerous factions that can be allied with or fought against, and NPCs will battle each other if the circumstances arise. 

Game has a story-mode and separate arena battle-royale mode:

  • Upto 16 player characters that you create can be used interchangeably in either mode. Items, gold, and experience carry over from each mode.

Game has two separate modes of combat:

  • (Default) ARPG style.

    Control 1 player in continuous mode, with (upto-15) party members supporting you automatically based upon your party settings.

  • Classic Turn-Based.

    Control every player when it is their turn to move. It will automatically switch to the party member whose turn it is.

Game has a story-mode and separate arena battle-royale mode:

  • Upto 16 player characters that you create can be used interchangeably in either mode. Items, gold, and experience carry over from each mode.

Game has two separate modes of combat:
